name: ConnectWise Automate (LabTech) – ConnectWise Automate (LabTech) service configuration includi
categoryDescription: Registry artifacts for 23 Remote Monitoring & Management (RMM) tools documented in the LOLRMM project (lolrmm.io). These tools have legitimate uses but are frequently abused by ransomware operators, APT groups, and tech-support fraud actors for persistent remote access. Each entry maps directly from lolrmm.io/api/rmm_tools.json. Parsed: 65 registry key paths across 23 tools.
description: [ConnectWise Automate (LabTech)] ConnectWise Automate (LabTech) service configuration including server URL, LocationID, and ClientID
forensic_value: Server URL reveals the MSP's Automate server; LocationID and ClientID identify the specific deployment; compromised MSP Automate servers have been used to push ransomware to all managed endpoints
